html:
Exclusive to:  

Electric Milk is a Dairy Food item from the Reign of Giants DLC. It is dropped by killing a Volt Goat that has been charged, i.e. struck by Lightning, or attacked with a Morning Star or an Electric Dart. Electric Milk can be consumed as it is, or used as an ingredient for recipes in the Crock Pot, such as Ice Cream.

When consumed, it restores 10 , making it a mediocre Sanity-restoring item; this is far lower than the Sanity restored from Ice Cream, a food that requires a dairy item such as Electric Milk to create.

Recipe

Electric Milk is a Dairy Food item from the Reign of Giants DLC. It is dropped by killing a Volt Goat that has been charged, i.e. struck by Lightning, or attacked with a Morning Star or an Electric Dart. Electric Milk can be consumed as it is, or used as an ingredient for recipes in the Crock Pot, such as Ice Cream.
When consumed, it restores 10 , making it a mediocre Sanity-restoring item; this is far lower than the Sanity restored from Ice Cream, a food that requires a dairy item such as Electric Milk to create.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Sữa Điện là một Thực Phẩm Sữa từ DLC Reign of Giants. Nó rơi ra khi giết một con Volt Goat đã được tích điện, tức là bị sét đánh hoặc bị tấn công bằng Sao mai hoặc Phi tiêu điện. Sữa Điện có thể được tiêu thụ nguyên gốc hoặc dùng làm nguyên liệu cho các công thức nấu ăn trong Nồi Hầm, chẳng hạn như Kem.

'''Electric Milk''' is a [[Dairy product|Dairy]] [[Food]] [[item]] from the ''[[Don't Starve: Reign of Giants|Reign of Giants]]'' DLC. It is dropped by killing a [[Volt Goat]] that has been charged, i.e. struck by [[Lightning]], or attacked with a [[Morning Star]] or an [[Electric Dart]]. Electric Milk can be consumed as it is, or used as an ingredient for recipes in the [[Crock Pot]], such as [[Ice Cream]].

When consumed, it restores 10 {{sanity}}, making it a mediocre [[Sanity Boost|Sanity-restoring item]]; this is far lower than the Sanity restored from Ice Cream, a food that requires a dairy item such as Electric Milk to create.
